args.query: SELECT business_ref, AVG(rating) as avg_rating, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM review WHERE date >= '2016-01-01' AND date <= '2016-06-30' GROUP BY business_ref HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY avg_rating DESC, cnt DESC LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT business_ref, AVG(rating) as avg_rating, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM review WHERE date >= '2016-01-01' AND date <= '2016-06-30' GROUP BY business_ref HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY avg_rating DESC, cnt DESC LIMIT 1;

args.query: SELECT business_ref, AVG(CAST(rating AS FLOAT)) as avg_rating, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM review WHERE date >= '2016-01-01' AND date <= '2016-06-30' GROUP BY business_ref HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY avg_rating DESC LIMIT 5;

exec_args.sql: SELECT business_ref, AVG(CAST(rating AS FLOAT)) as avg_rating, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM review WHERE date >= '2016-01-01' AND date <= '2016-06-30' GROUP BY business_ref HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY avg_rating DESC LIMIT 5;

args.query: SELECT date, strptime(date, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p') as parsed_date FROM review LIMIT 1

args.query: SELECT business_ref, AVG(CAST(rating AS FLOAT)) as avg_rating, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM review WHERE CAST(strptime(date, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p') AS DATE) >= '2016-01-01' AND CAST(strptime(date, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p') AS DATE) <= '2016-06-30' GROUP BY business_ref HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY avg_rating DESC LIMIT 5;

exec_args.sql: SELECT business_ref, AVG(CAST(rating AS FLOAT)) as avg_rating, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM review WHERE CAST(strptime(date, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p') AS DATE) >= '2016-01-01' AND CAST(strptime(date, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p') AS DATE) <= '2016-06-30' GROUP BY business_ref HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY avg_rating DESC LIMIT 5;

args.query: SELECT date, COALESCE(try_strptime(date, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), try_strptime(date, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), try_strptime(date, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), try_strptime(date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')) as parsed FROM review LIMIT 20

exec_args.sql: SELECT date, COALESCE(try_strptime(date, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), try_strptime(date, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), try_strptime(date, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), try_strptime(date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')) as parsed FROM review LIMIT 20

args.query: SELECT business_ref, AVG(CAST(rating AS FLOAT)) as avg_rating, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM review WHERE COALESCE(try_strptime(date, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), try_strptime(date, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), try_strptime(date, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), try_strptime(date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')) BETWEEN '2016-01-01 00:00:00' AND '2016-06-30 23:59:59' GROUP BY business_ref HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY avg_rating DESC, cnt DESC LIMIT 5;

exec_args.sql: SELECT business_ref, AVG(CAST(rating AS FLOAT)) as avg_rating, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM review WHERE COALESCE(try_strptime(date, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), try_strptime(date, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), try_strptime(date, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), try_strptime(date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')) BETWEEN '2016-01-01 00:00:00' AND '2016-06-30 23:59:59' GROUP BY business_ref HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY avg_rating DESC, cnt DESC LIMIT 5;
